keymodal.heading.first: Sign in with your API key
keymodal.sub.first: Paste the API key your administrator issued from the new-api gateway.
keymodal.sub.expired: Your session is no longer valid. Paste your API key to continue.
keymodal.help: Don't have a key yet? Ask your administrator. Keys are issued and billed through the upstream gateway, not here.
keymodal.error.invalid_key: That API key was rejected by the upstream gateway. Check it for typos or ask your admin for a new one.
keymodal.error.upstream_unreachable: The upstream gateway is unreachable right now. Try again in a moment.
keymodal.error.misconfigured: The server can't reach the configured upstream URL. Ask your administrator to check the new-api configuration.
settings.account.title: Account
settings.not_signed_in: Not signed in. Return to chat and send a message to sign in with your API key.
settings.preferences.title: Preferences
settings.about.title: About this service
settings.about.body: Authentication and billing are handled by the upstream new-api gateway. Your API key was issued by your administrator; to request more capacity or a new key, contact them directly. This interface only stores the cookie session — your key is encrypted at rest and never displayed back.
